message:
chore(repo): initialize Bun workspaces + TS/Biome baseline

This lays down the repo-wide tooling/contracts needed for the Flywheel Gateway monorepo (per AGENTS.md + docs/PLAN.md stack choices).

What’s included
- Root `package.json` configured as a Bun workspace root (`apps/*`, `packages/*`).
- Canonical scripts wired for the expected workflow:
  - `dev` fan-out (`dev:gateway`, `dev:web`)
  - `build`, `test`, `test:integration`, `test:e2e`
  - `lint`, `lint:fix`, `format`, `typecheck`
  - DB command placeholders (`db:*`) to align with the plan/Drizzle flows.
- `biome.json` baseline:
  - Formatter enabled (2-space indent) + import organization
  - Recommended lint rules
  - Ignores common build artifacts (`dist`, `build`, `.turbo`).
- Root `tsconfig.json` baseline:
  - Strict mode on + “bundler” module resolution
  - Modern targets (`ES2022` + DOM)
  - Internal workspace path aliases for `@flywheel/*` packages.

Why this matters
- Establishes a single source of truth for formatting/linting/typechecking from day 1.
- Ensures every future package/app can share strict TS settings and consistent imports.
- Keeps the monorepo layout + scripts aligned with the planned architecture (Bun runtime, Biome, TS strict).

Notes
- No lockfile is committed here; that should come from an explicit dependency install step.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+{
+  "name": "flywheel-gateway",
+  "private": true,
+  "type": "module",
+  "workspaces": ["apps/*", "packages/*"],
+  "scripts": {
+    "dev": "bun run dev:gateway & bun run dev:web",
+    "dev:gateway": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway dev",
+    "dev:web": "bun run --filter @flywheel/web dev",
+    "build": "bun run --filter '*' build",
+    "test": "bun test",
+    "test:integration": "bun test --filter 'tests/integration/**'",
+    "test:e2e": "bunx playwright test",
+    "lint": "biome check .",
+    "lint:fix": "biome check --write .",
+    "format": "biome format --write .",
+    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
+    "db:generate": "bun db:generate",
+    "db:migrate": "bun db:migrate",
+    "db:studio": "bun db:studio"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "@biomejs/biome": "^2.0.0",
+    "typescript": "^5.9.3"
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+{
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    "target": "ES2022",
+    "module": "ESNext",
+    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
+    "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM"],
+    "strict": true,
+    "skipLibCheck": true,
+    "noEmit": true,
+    "esModuleInterop": true,
+    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
+    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
+    "resolveJsonModule": true,
+    "isolatedModules": true,
+    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
+    "declaration": true,
+    "declarationMap": true,
+    "sourceMap": true,
+    "noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
+    "noImplicitOverride": true,
+    "noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature": true,
+    "exactOptionalPropertyTypes": true,
+    "baseUrl": ".",
+    "paths": {
+      "@flywheel/shared": ["packages/shared/src/index.ts"],
+      "@flywheel/shared/*": ["packages/shared/src/*"],
+      "@flywheel/agent-drivers": ["packages/agent-drivers/src/index.ts"],
+      "@flywheel/agent-drivers/*": ["packages/agent-drivers/src/*"],
+      "@flywheel/flywheel-clients": ["packages/flywheel-clients/src/index.ts"],
+      "@flywheel/flywheel-clients/*": ["packages/flywheel-clients/src/*"],
+      "@flywheel/test-utils": ["packages/test-utils/src/index.ts"],
+      "@flywheel/test-utils/*": ["packages/test-utils/src/*"]
+    }
+  },
+  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "build", ".turbo"]
+}
